none.justification: It correctly classifies the few sites it found, but it misses most USE_JEMALLOC files and several HAVE_BACKTRACE occurrences; the GT has 13 src files for jemalloc and 15 backtrace occurrences in debug.c, plus the Makefile effect.

ccodegraph.justification: Same major failure as Answer A: it falsely says only debug.c and zmalloc.c are involved and reports only 4 jemalloc and 10 backtrace sites, missing most of the verified inventory and the Makefile-level jemalloc behavior.

lsp.justification: It captures the important source-level inventory and classifications, including the mixed debug.c jemalloc sites and all HAVE_BACKTRACE occurrences in debug.c. The real gap is that it omits the GT-required src/Makefile jemalloc build/link dependency effect, so it is not fully correct.
